pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and verifier.py explicit string literals
verifier.py enforcing min 7.0 ground hit velocity
verifier.py enforcing max 8.0 ground hit velocity

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 'simple_model_rocket.ork', a standard example rocket design provided with OpenRocket (designed by Sampo Niskanen). The verifier expects the parachute to be replaced with a streamer exactly 0.05 meters (5.0 cm) wide and the ground hit velocity to be between 7.0 m/s and 8.0 m/s. However, there is a critical bug in the verifier's anti-gaming logic: it fails the task if any <masscomponent> elements are found, assuming the agent added them to artificially lower descent rate. Because the original 'A simple model rocket' file naturally includes a 'Wadding' mass component, the verifier will perpetually fail any valid submission with 'ANTI-GAMING FAIL' unless the agent unintuitively deletes the preexisting wadding.
